subject: 📋 Notion Test — Send Eddie a 👍 in Telegram
message:
Hey Cyony —

We're testing the Notion relay system. Eddie wants to see if you can receive messages through this pipeline.

**Your task:** Send Eddie a 👍 (thumbs up) in Telegram. That's it. Just react or reply with a thumbs up so he knows you got this.

**Why:** We're setting up Notion as a crew comms hub. You'll be checking the Crew Ops Inbox on Notion for tasks going forward.

**Eddie's Telegram:** 8808479511

— Tripp 🔺
